response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled technical individual contributor with a strong open-source background, but he lacks the executive-level leadership and formal IT consulting experience required for this Head of Development role. Crucially, his basic German proficiency falls far short of the strict C1 requirement necessary for client advisory and team leadership in this context.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience in modern software development and open-source technologies.
Demonstrated initiative through founding an open-source platform (GISCollective) and organizing coding workshops.
Holds a relevant university degree (BS in Computer Science).
concerns: German language skills are only at a basic level, failing the strict C1 minimum requirement.
Lacks executive-level leadership, project management, and formal team management experience.
No demonstrated experience in formal enterprise architecture modeling (UML), IT security, or compliance consulting.
